What's new in Azure OpenAI in Azure AI Foundry Models (classic)

Page last updated: 2026-03-13

February 2026:
- GPT-Realtime-1.5 and GPT-Audio-1.5 models released — improved instruction following, multi-lingual support, and tool calling

December 2025:
- GPT-image-1.5 model available (limited access) — improved performance, quality, editing controls, face preservation, inpainting
- gpt-4o-mini-transcribe-2025-12-15 ASR model — ~50% lower WER, improved multilingual, reduced hallucinations
- gpt-realtime-mini-2025-12-15 speech-to-speech model — feature parity with full gpt-realtime
- gpt-4o-mini-tts-2025-12-15 text-to-speech model — improved multilingual synthesis

October 2025:
- Realtime API SIP support for telephony
- gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize ASR model with speaker diarization
- gpt-image-1-mini model for global deployments
- PII detection content filter

September 2025:
- GPT-5-codex available (limited access)
- Sora video-to-video support

August 2025:
- Sora image-to-video support (Sweden Central, East US 2)
- Realtime API audio model GA (new voices Marin/Cedar, image input, improved function calling, conversation mode)
- Provisioned spillover GA
- GPT-5 models (gpt-5, gpt-5-mini, gpt-5-nano, gpt-5-chat) available
- Model router updated with GPT-5 support

July 2025:
- GPT-image-1 update: input_fidelity parameter, partial image streaming

June 2025:
- codex-mini and o3-pro models released

May 2025:
- Sora video generation (preview)
- Spotlighting for prompt shields (preview)
- Model router (preview)

April 2025:
- Realtime API WebRTC support (preview)
- GPT-image-1 released (preview, limited access)
- o4-mini and o3 models released
- GPT-4.1 and GPT-4.1-nano released (1M token context)
- gpt-4o-transcribe, gpt-4o-mini-transcribe, gpt-4o-mini-tts audio models

March 2025:
- Responses API and computer-use-preview model
- Provisioned spillover (preview)
- Request-time content filtering configuration

February 2025:
- GPT-4.5 Preview
- Stored completions API
- o3-mini data zone standard deployments
- gpt-4o-mini-audio-preview and gpt-4o-mini-realtime-preview

January 2025:
- o3-mini released
- GPT-4o audio completions global deployments
- GPT Realtime API 2024-12-17 (prompt caching, new voices, RPM/TPM rate limits)

December 2024:
- o1 reasoning model (limited access)
- Preference fine-tuning DPO (preview)
- Stored completions & distillation
- GPT-4o 2024-11-20 global standard deployment
- Data zone provisioned deployment type

Updated: 2026-04-10
